home.seoTitle: Bosna Oto Lastik | Tire Shop in Konya Selçuklu — Mounting, Balancing & Repair
home.seoDescription: Tire mounting, balancing, flat repair and sales in Konya Selçuklu. Authorized Lastiğim dealer (Lassa & Bridgestone). Open 7 days 08:30–00:00. +90 535 785 55 87
home.heroDescription: Tire sales, mounting, balancing and repair since 2015 in Konya. New and used tires — everything your vehicle needs in one place.

highlights.expertText: Mahmut Büyükyılmaz's craft journey started in 1993 — today serving Konya under the Bosna Oto Lastik name.
highlights.brandsText: We are an authorized member of Lastiğim — Brisa's (Bridgestone × Sabancı) dealer network. Campaign pricing and guaranteed products on Lassa and Bridgestone.
highlights.fastText: Every day from 08:30 to midnight. We're here when you need us most.

home.ctaTitle: Let's find the right tire for your car
home.ctaText: Share your plate or vehicle model — we'll send matching sizes and price options.

faq.q1: Which tire brands do you carry?
faq.a1: We carry Lassa and Bridgestone as primary brands (as an authorized Lastiğim dealer), plus Michelin, Continental, Pirelli, Goodyear, Hankook and Petlas.
faq.a2: We are open 7 days a week, Monday through Sunday, from 08:30 to midnight (00:00).
faq.a3: Yes, we stock both new and used tires. Contact us via WhatsApp or phone for budget-friendly options.
faq.q4: How long does a flat tire repair take?
faq.a4: A standard flat repair takes 15–30 minutes. Repair with balancing is 300 ₺, without balancing is 250 ₺ (VAT excluded).
faq.q5: When should I get wheel balancing done?
faq.a5: After every new tire fitting, after a tire change, and whenever you feel steering wheel vibration. Balancing extends tire life significantly.
faq.a6: We are at Bosna Hersek Mah., Osmanlı Cd. No:14/20, 42250 Selçuklu/Konya. Easily reachable via Google Maps.

services.seoTitle: Tire Mounting, Balancing & Repair in Konya Selçuklu | Bosna Oto Lastik
services.seoDescription: Professional tire mounting, balancing, flat repair, rim sales and tire storage in Konya Selçuklu. All passenger and commercial vehicles.
services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: From tire sales to maintenance and repair — everything your vehicle needs in one place.

items.saleText: Summer, winter and all-season tires. New and used — wide stock across premium and budget brands.
items.mountText: Modern mounting machines — fast change without damaging your wheels or tires.
items.balanceText: Precise balancing that prevents steering wheel vibration and extends tire life.
items.repairText: No quick-fix sealants — proper internal cord patches for lasting repairs.
items.storageText: Seasonal storage with controlled humidity and temperature.
items.rimText: OEM and aftermarket steel and alloy wheel options.
items.fleetText: Bulk pricing and scheduled maintenance plans for company fleets.

about.seoTitle: About Us | Tire Shop in Konya Since 1993 | Bosna Oto Lastik
about.seoDescription: Mahmut Büyükyılmaz's tire expertise started in 1993. Since 2015, Bosna Oto Lastik has been serving Konya Selçuklu with trusted tire services.
about.title: About Us
about.lead: Bosna Oto Lastik has been Konya's address for road safety and comfort since 2015.
about.p1: But our story goes back to Mahmut Büyükyılmaz's craft journey that began in 1993. Today, under one roof, we cover everything from tire replacement and auto care to new and used tire sales and professional repair services.
about.p2: For us, every customer is a friend who shouldn't be left stranded on the road. Our goal is to get you back on the road safely, quickly, and with peace of mind.
about.p3: We're open 7 days a week from 08:30 to midnight. We accept credit and debit cards (Mastercard, VISA).
